name: store-sense
description: StoreSense Accounting - Enterprise Multi-Business SaaS Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:frontend-items"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:frontend-items
scripts.db:init: npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
